def negative_python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_temporary_directory_not_cleaned_promptly():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_temporary_directory_not_cleaned_promptly"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag TemporaryDirectory or temp files held across long workflows after their last use."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
